arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta confirms key double injury boost for Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: Gunners bolstered for huge Champions League quarter-final second leg, though one player has stayed at home

arts.ttl: Arteta: We have to be brave and bold at the Bernabeu
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta insists that his side must be "brave and bold" as they head into the cauldron of Real Madrid's Bernabeu Stadium for Wednesday night's UEFA Champions League quarter-final second leg. Arsenal's stunning first-leg win, inspired by two sensational Declan Rice free-kicks, may have put them in control, yet Arteta insists that their preparation is focused on this being a match "at half-time".

arts.ttl: Real Madrid eye Mbappe repeat as €70m bid prepared
arts.sum: If Real Madrid are able to finalise an agreement to sign Mendes this year, he would become the second PSG player to move to the Santiago Bernabeu in the last two summer windows - following Kylian Mbappe ’s switch in 2024. However, the Portugal star signed a new four-year contract at PSG in February and the Parisians are therefore unlikely to sanction an exit unless Real Madrid submit an offer that far exceeds his Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) of €60m.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends message to Arsenal stars after Carlo Ancelotti makes 'balls' jibe
arts.sum: Real Madrid will look to overturn a 3-0 deficit as they take on Arsenal in the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final with Mikel Arteta urging his stars to make history

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Arsenal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Real Madrid and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal: Vinicius Junior out to emulate Cristiano Ronaldo, Karim Benzema, Raul feat on Wednesday
arts.sum: Vincius Junior has the chance to emulate a feat only achieved by Cristiano Ronaldo, Karim Benzema and Raul when Real Madrid face Arsenal at the Bernabeu on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals Arsenal’s mindset ahead of Real Madrid second leg
arts.sum: Arsenal take a three-goal advantage to the Spanish capital after a famous night last week

arts.ttl: Real Madrid granted huge special request for Arsenal Champions League clash
arts.sum: UEFA are allowing Real Madrid to close the Santiago Bernabeu Stadium roof for their Champions League quarter-final second leg against Arsenal . Champions League regulations differ from those in La Liga, where clubs decide whether to keep their stadium's roof open or closed.

arts.ttl: Report: Florentino Perez has just made Real Madrid's players a strong promise if they comeback vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Florentino Perez has just given Real Madrid’s players an extra incentive to produce a comeback against Arsenal in the Champions League. Carlo Ancelotti’s side are...

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale given Man United £25m transfer green light amid Arsenal reunion verdict
arts.sum: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Aaron Ramsdale has been told he would be a better option at Manchester United than Andre Onana. And former Rangers boss Ally MCcoist and ex-Sky Sports presenter Jeff Stelling have had their say on reports that Ramsdale could be a potential summer replacement for United's under-fire goalkeeper.
